title: allantoma decandra
intro: Allantoma decandra, also known as the "Garden Balsam" or "Yellow Balsam", is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Allantoma decandra include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Allantoma decandra include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
